mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, p.title AS post_title, c.user_id, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT c JOIN COMMUNITY p ON c.post_id = p.post_id ORDER BY c.comment_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY_COMMENT SET status = 'BANNED', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{comment_id} AND status = 'DISPLAY'
UPDATE COMMUNITY_COMMENT SET status = 'DISPLAY', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{comment_id} AND status = 'BANNED'
UPDATE COMMUNITY_COMMENT SET status = 'HIDDEN', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{comment_id} AND status != 'HIDDEN'
